subject: eldritch_milestone_grant_research

original_behavior.ELDRITCHMINOR: if actualwarp>25 and not complete: grantResearch(player,10); complete ELDRITCHMINOR. No chat line.
original_behavior.ELDRITCHMAJOR: if actualwarp>50 and not complete: grantResearch(player,20); complete ELDRITCHMAJOR. No chat line.
original_behavior.grantResearch: amt = 1 + rand.nextInt(times); for a in amt: pick random primal of 6; addAspectPool(+1).

port_change: Removed fabricated milestone chat literals ('Something alien becomes visible...', 'The Eldritch tab opens fully.'); MINOR/MAJOR now unlock with null message and call grantResearch(ELDRITCH_MINOR_RESEARCH_GRANTS=10 / ELDRITCH_MAJOR_RESEARCH_GRANTS=20) on first unlock, mirroring WarpEvents.grantResearch (PlayerAspectKnowledge.addPool).
note: Static parity only; no javac, no Gradle, no GameTest server run in sandbox.
